CustomField.description: Result of test for individual animal
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(APHA_TestType__c) == 'SICCT', IF ( (APHA_TestDay2Bovine__c - APHA_TestDay1Bovine__c) > (APHA_TestDay2Avian__c - APHA_TestDay1Avian__c), "Reaction", IF( (APHA_TestDay2Bovine__c-APHA_TestDay1Bovine__c)==(APHA_TestDay2Avian__c-APHA_TestDay1Avian__c),"Inconclusive Reaction","No Reaction") ), IF( TEXT(APHA_TestType__c) == 'DIVA', IF( APHA_TestDay2DIVA__c >(2*APHA_TestDay1DIVA__c), "Reaction", IF( APHA_TestDay2DIVA__c >(1.5*APHA_TestDay1DIVA__c) , "Inconclusive Reaction","No Reaction" ) ) , "" ) )
CustomField.label: Result - Calculated
